title: Warehouse order batching and routing
prompt: At a cutoff time, a warehouse batches known orders and routes pickers to minimize walking distance. Congestion, uncertain arrivals after cutoff, and picker learning are not modeled. Explain the decision and computational challenge without adding these mechanisms.

model_specification.model_type: joint batching and routing integer program
model_specification.mechanism: Batch composition changes which item locations can be visited on one route and therefore total travel.
model_specification.uncertainty: none for orders available at cutoff

prohibited_inferences: The model reduces congestion or labor learning effects

evidence_needs.claim: Walking distance maps to operating burden
